scenarios.title: Evidence available after a decision is excluded from that decision

gherkin.given: a source-recorded observation has immutable availability later than a frozen decision timestamp
gherkin.when: the hypothesis is evaluated at the earlier decision timestamp
gherkin.then: the observation is excluded with CR-TIME-INELIGIBLE and the frozen candidate stage evidence references and digest remain unchanged

linkedTests.testId: Regression: Evidence available after a decision is excluded from that decision

scenarios.title: One announcement drives price options and ETF activity

gherkin.given: catalyst and market-reaction observations share one valid origin and dependency chain
gherkin.when: the foundation clusters evidence and evaluates the candidate
gherkin.then: all reactions form one independent cluster and cannot create duplicate causal reason keys

linkedTests.testId: Regression: One announcement drives price options and ETF activity

scenarios.title: Decision-critical valuation and timing inputs are stale or unavailable

gherkin.given: forward valuation lacks a current provider timestamp and the owner timing read is stale
gherkin.when: the candidate is evaluated under every sensitivity posture
gherkin.then: valuation and timing remain stale or unavailable cannot support promotion and are never neutralized

linkedTests.testId: Regression: Decision-critical valuation and timing inputs are stale or unavailable

scenarios.title: A sourced policy mechanism leads market confirmation

gherkin.given: a source-dated catalyst has valid regime transmission and falsifiers but no confirmed timing read
gherkin.when: the user selects Discovery in the Simple view
gherkin.then: the candidate appears as cause-emerging without action copy and explains the changed and invariant gates

linkedTests.testId: Regression: A sourced policy mechanism leads market confirmation

scenarios.title: Fundamental evidence contradicts an oversold semiconductor rebound

gherkin.given: semiconductor breadth repairs while current source-recorded revisions or guidance deteriorate
gherkin.when: the user opens the candidate in Power view
gherkin.then: fundamental contradiction precedes support and the result is reflex-bounce risk or contradicted rather than durable repair

linkedTests.testId: Regression: Fundamental evidence contradicts an oversold semiconductor rebound

scenarios.title: A required chart input is unavailable and local decision storage fails

gherkin.given: a required chart contract is incomplete and browser storage rejects a decision append
gherkin.when: the user inspects the chart and freezes the decision
gherkin.then: the UI shows structured unavailability and an unsaved draft and never claims persistence

linkedTests.testId: Regression: A required chart input is unavailable and local decision storage fails

scenarios.title: Sector acceleration remains visible while cause is unverified

gherkin.given: Sector Rotation reports positive acceleration while causal evidence is missing stale or contradictory
gherkin.when: the sector result renders with causal context
gherkin.then: RRG ranking timing and verdict remain unchanged while separate context reads cause unverified

linkedTests.testId: Regression: Sector acceleration remains visible while cause is unverified

scenarios.title: A country causal read disagrees with its market model

gherkin.given: Global Rotation has a current country timing read and a contradicted or regime-fragile causal projection
gherkin.then: causal context appears separately while momentum trend FX risk and allocation order remain unchanged

linkedTests.testId: Regression: A country causal read disagrees with its market model

scenarios.title: Energy equities strengthen while the underlying proxy remains weak

gherkin.given: energy equities strengthen versus a weak underlying proxy while verified inventory or curve evidence is unavailable
gherkin.when: Real Assets renders the matching causal projection
gherkin.then: divergence and limitations are visible unavailable causes stay unavailable and the owner model is unchanged

linkedTests.testId: Regression: Energy equities strengthen while the underlying proxy remains weak

scenarios.title: A valid early candidate does not change the next-session plan

gherkin.given: a complete cause-emerging candidate neither changes independently confirms nor falsifies the next-session plan
gherkin.when: Tier B validates the Market Brief payload
gherkin.then: the candidate is coverage-only with a reason and consumes no action or attention slot

linkedTests.testId: Regression: A valid early candidate does not change the next-session plan

scenarios.title: Causal evidence and market reactions share one origin

gherkin.given: a candidate and its price options and ETF reactions trace to one origin already used by the plan
gherkin.then: the reactions add no independent reason key and cannot qualify as independent confirmation

linkedTests.testId: Regression: Causal evidence and market reactions share one origin

scenarios.title: Headless causal validation fails while other Brief tools remain valid

gherkin.given: a committed causal record has a schema identity or ledger integrity error
gherkin.then: causal output is explicitly unavailable without stage or relevance while unrelated tool reads continue

linkedTests.testId: Regression: Headless causal validation fails while other Brief tools remain valid

gherkin.given: a frozen decision is invalidated before confirmation by source-recorded evidence
gherkin.when: the outcome is appended and history is reviewed
gherkin.then: the candidate is falsified while original evidence posture thresholds candidate bytes and digest remain unchanged

scenarios.title: A ledger event requires a reviewed correction

gherkin.given: an existing committed ledger event requires a reviewed correction
gherkin.then: a new correction references the original event while prior JSONL lines remain unchanged and visible

linkedTests.testId: Regression: A ledger event requires a reviewed correction

scenarios.title: A user opens the Research Lab catalog after full causal delivery

gherkin.given: the owner consumers Brief gate validators and ledger are complete
gherkin.when: registry navigation and notes parity are validated
gherkin.then: Causal Rotation Lab appears exactly once with resolving production notes data and coverage links

linkedTests.testId: Regression: A user opens the Research Lab catalog after full causal delivery

scenarios.title: A source-recorded candidate moves from owner research to Brief coverage

gherkin.given: committed causal records and current owner timing reads pass their contracts
gherkin.when: the local production site refresh and validators run
gherkin.then: owner consumers and Brief use one candidate contract while every market owner retains its verdict

linkedTests.testId: Regression: A source-recorded candidate moves from owner research to Brief coverage

scenarios.title: Multiple integrity failures are introduced independently

gherkin.given: later evidence stale timing missing source unknown versions conflicting identity and unavailable fundamentals are introduced independently
gherkin.when: each case runs through production validators and the live browser
gherkin.then: each fails closed visibly without a neutral score current stage action slot or false persistence while unrelated tools remain usable

linkedTests.testId: Regression: Multiple integrity failures are introduced independently

scenarios.title: The complete tool is exercised across supported static runtimes

gherkin.given: production assets run locally and on GitHub Pages while a repeated recorded-contract corpus is evaluated
gherkin.when: desktop mobile and deterministic load checks run
gherkin.then: the static experience remains nonblank responsive deterministic bounded and free of runtime backend bundler auth or credential dependencies

linkedTests.testId: Regression: The complete tool is exercised across supported static runtimes
